LanguageData.Omen_of_Doomsday.label: Omen of Doomsday
LanguageData.Omen_of_Doomsday.description: High-power mechanoid signal emitter vastly exceeding standard beacon capacity. Activation releases a catastrophic pulse summoning the titan-class Doxa-0 with its escort forces. Victory yields rare tech components from the wreckage. The pulse overload destroys the emitter after single use.
